holdings.n: Hermès International Société en commandite par actions

holdings.infoBox: PJBF is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 7.18%, Prudential Govt Money Mkt Fd at 6.54%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 5.62%, Advanced Micro Devices at 4.86%, and Galderma Group AG at 4.71%.

overview.description: The PGIM Jennison Better Future ETF (PJBF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital growth by adopting a socially and environmentally conscious approach that integrates United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (UN SDGs) into the selection process. PJBF was launched on Dec 14, 2023 and is issued by PGIM.
